title: pavonia exasperata
intro: Pavonia exasperata, also known as the sensitive rose or rock rose, is a plant species in the mallow family native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pavonia exasperata include reducing fever and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
